creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Philip Paeps from comment #1)

Thanks, and sorry, I didn't realise that it's simply an (automated) mirror. 

Side note: I haven't properly got my head around mirroring. <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/mirrors/> partly inconsistent with README.TXT files (I assume that the latter are significantly outdated).
